title: gonystylus costalis
intro: Gonystylus costalis, also known as the Borneo ironwood or seraya, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Borneo, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving digestive issues. Gonystylus costalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of Asia.
